title: get random item every second
description: you wait a second, you get a item. (plz gimme ideas for new mods im bored as shi-)
body:
you **wait one second** and you get a mystery **item** woah!!!!
**this only works in singleplayer btw** so dont try to use it in some server or smth (i need filler cuz i need 200+ letters to sumbit for review lol)
